grid: noun. A rectangular array of squares or rectangles of equal size, such as in a crossword puzzle.
grin: noun. A smile in which the lips are parted to reveal the teeth.
grind: verb. To reduce to smaller pieces by crushing with lateral motion.

kid: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Koshin.
kin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Kinyarwanda.
kind: noun. A type, race or category; a group of entities that have common characteristics such that they may be grouped together.
king: noun. A male monarch; a man who heads a monarchy; in an absolute monarchy, the supreme ruler of his nation.

kir: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Kyrgyz.
rid: verb. Followed by of: to free (oneself or someone, or a place) from an annoyance or hindrance.
riding: verb. present participle and gerund of ride
rig: noun. The rigging of a sailing ship or other such craft.
rin: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nungu.
ring: noun. A solid object in the shape of a circle.
rink: noun. A man, especially a warrior or hero.
